headline: On-the-job accident Preparation Checklist — West Valley City
articleBody:
On-the-job accident Preparation Checklist for West Valley City Clients

Before your On-the-job accident appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
